settings.heading: How does it work?
settings.content:
We recommend using the moisturizer daily (morning & night) for best results.

1️⃣ Prep – Cleanse your face and apply your serum or treatment products first.

2️⃣ Apply – Take a small amount of moisturizer and apply evenly across your face and neck.

3️⃣ Massage – Gently massage into the skin using upward motions until fully absorbed.

4️⃣ Hydrate – Let the peptides and hydrating ingredients help plump, smooth, and nourish the skin barrier.

5️⃣ Glow – Enjoy softer, firmer, and more radiant-looking skin ✨

settings.heading: Ingredients
settings.content:
We do not include any harmful parabens or harsh ingredients. We also NEVER test on animals.

  • 3X Pro-Collagen Peptides – They help support collagen & elastin levels to visibly improve firmness, smooth fine lines, and restore skin bounce.
  • Hyaluronic Acid – It helps deeply hydrate and plump the skin while reducing the look of dehydration lines for a smoother complexion.
  • Squalane – It helps nourish and strengthen the skin barrier while locking in moisture and softening rough texture.
  • Glycerin – It attracts moisture into the skin to provide long-lasting hydration and maintain a healthy, supple feel.

As with all skincare products, we highly recommend performing a patch test on a small area of skin before full use, as some individuals may be more sensitive to certain ingredients.

settings.heading: Key Benefits
settings.content:
Deep Hydration & Peptide Repair: Powered by skin-supporting peptides to deeply hydrate, nourish, and help improve the look of fine lines and tired, dry skin.

Firmer, Smoother-Looking Skin: Helps improve skin elasticity and softness for a plumper, more youthful-looking complexion.

Strengthens the Skin Barrier: Supports and reinforces the skin barrier to help lock in moisture and protect against dryness and environmental stressors.

Rich Yet Lightweight Moisture: Delivers long-lasting hydration without feeling heavy, greasy, or sticky—perfect for daily use.

Smooth Texture & Healthy Glow: Helps soften rough texture, improve skin smoothness, and restore a naturally radiant, healthy-looking glow.

Daily Anti-Aging Moisturizer: Designed to hydrate, replenish, and support aging skin while improving overall skin comfort and appearance.

settings.heading: Can I use it for sensitive skin?
settings.content: Yes! This peptide moisturizer is formulated to be gentle, nourishing, and non-irritating. It helps deeply hydrate, support the skin barrier, and improve the appearance of fine lines and dryness—making it suitable for most skin types, including sensitive skin.

settings.heading: Shipping & Returns
settings.content:
Processing Time:
Once your order is placed, please allow 24 hours for us to process and prepare your order for shipment.

Shipping Time:
After your order is dispatched, it will typically take 4-6 business days to reach you, depending on your location.

Tracking Information:
Once your order has been shipped, you will receive an email containing your tracking number. You can use this to track your package and stay updated on its delivery status.

Returns:
We want you to be fully satisfied with your purchase! If you are not completely happy with your order, we accept returns and exchanges within 60 days from the date of purchase.

Contact us via the website or via email: info@niforashop.com

settings.title: You may also like
settings.description: Unlock Full Results with the Complete Skincare Routine

settings.text: Each ingredient in our Peptide Moisturizer is thoughtfully selected and backed by science—not hype. We use no harsh fillers or unnecessary additives—just a clean, nourishing formula powered by skin-supporting peptides, hydrating actives, and barrier-loving ingredients to help deeply moisturize, smooth, and support healthier-looking skin.

settings.title: Collagen Peptides
settings.text: Skin-Firming Support
settings.modal_text: Peptides are powerful skin-supporting ingredients that help improve the appearance of fine lines, dryness, and loss of firmness. In this moisturizer, they work to support smoother, firmer, and more youthful-looking skin while helping strengthen and replenish the skin barrier.

settings.title: Squalane
settings.text: Deep Hydration
settings.modal_text: Squalane is a deeply nourishing ingredient that helps hydrate, soften, and support the skin barrier. It mimics the skin’s natural oils to lock in moisture without feeling heavy or greasy, making it ideal for dry, dehydrated, or aging skin. In this moisturizer, it helps improve smoothness, reduce moisture loss, and promote softer, healthier-looking skin.

settings.title: Glycerin
settings.text: Moisture Retention
settings.modal_text: Glycerin is a powerful moisture-attracting ingredient that helps draw hydration into the skin and keep it locked in for lasting softness and comfort. It supports the skin barrier, helps reduce dryness and tightness, and improves overall skin smoothness—making it ideal for dehydrated or sensitive skin. In this moisturizer, it helps maintain deep hydration and promotes healthier, more supple-looking skin.

settings.title: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.text: Boosts Skin Hydration
settings.modal_text: Hyaluronic Acid is a moisture-binding ingredient that deeply hydrates the skin, helping it feel plump, smooth, and supple. It helps attract and retain moisture to support skin elasticity and reduce the appearance of dryness and fine lines. In this peptide moisturizer, it enhances hydration levels while supporting softer, healthier, and more youthful-looking skin.

settings.title: Glycerin
settings.text: Moisture Lock
settings.modal_text: Glycerin is a powerful humectant that draws moisture into the skin and helps maintain hydration levels. It works to soften rough patches, improve skin elasticity, and support the skin’s natural barrier. In the Bio-Collagen Mask, it helps lock in moisture, keeping the skin plump, smooth, and comfortable during and after use.

settings.title: Galactomyces
settings.text: Radiance Booster
settings.modal_text: Galactomyces is a fermented yeast extract rich in vitamins, amino acids, and antioxidants that help nourish and revitalize the skin. It works to improve skin clarity, refine pores, and balance sebum production. It enhances radiance, smooths texture, and supports a brighter, more even complexion.

settings.text: As the actives absorb deeper, hydration intensifies. Collagen and peptides work to smooth fine lines, ease fatigue, and revive tired, dull-looking skin.

settings.text: Once the mask is removed, skin feels deeply hydrated, plumper, smoother, and more radiant — revealing a firmer, youthful-looking glow that lasts beyond the treatment.

settings.title: Say Goodbye to Dry, Dehydrated Skin
settings.text: Wake up to deeply hydrated, softer-looking skin with lasting moisture and improved comfort. Powered by collagen peptides, hyaluronic acid, and glycerin, this moisturizer helps replenish hydration levels, support the skin barrier, and reduce moisture loss—leaving your skin feeling smoother, plumper, and more refreshed with every use.

settings.title: Reveal Firmer, Smoother-Looking Skin
settings.text: Support skin elasticity and visible firmness with nourishing ingredients designed to improve the look of fine lines and rough texture. Powered by collagen peptides and squalane, this moisturizer helps soften the appearance of aging skin while promoting a smoother, more youthful-looking complexion over time.

settings.title: Strengthen & Protect Your Skin Barrier
settings.text: Healthy skin starts with a strong moisture barrier. Formulated with ceramides, glycerin, and squalane, this moisturizer helps reinforce the skin barrier, lock in hydration, and protect against dryness and environmental stressors—keeping skin balanced, calm, and resilient.

settings.title: Restore a Healthy, Radiant Glow
settings.text: Bring dull, tired-looking skin back to life with intense nourishment and hydration. Powered by hyaluronic acid, peptides, and skin-conditioning ingredients, this moisturizer helps improve overall skin smoothness and radiance—revealing softer, glowier, and healthier-looking skin with consistent use.

settings.title: Visible Results After One Use
settings.text: From dry, tired, or uneven skin to smooth, radiant, and deeply hydrated — our masks are made to transform mature skin. Our mask refines texture, calm sensitivity, and bring back that healthy glow your skin deserves.

settings.question: What does the Peptide Moisturizer do?
settings.answer: It helps deeply hydrate, nourish, and support firmer, smoother, and healthier-looking skin while improving the appearance of dryness and fine lines.

settings.question: Is it suitable for sensitive skin?
settings.answer: Yes! The formula is designed to be gentle, hydrating, and non-irritating, making it suitable for most skin types, including sensitive skin.

settings.question: Can I use it every day?
settings.answer: Absolutely. It’s designed for daily use, both morning and night.

settings.question: Will it feel greasy or heavy on the skin?
settings.answer: No. The moisturizer delivers rich hydration while still feeling lightweight and comfortable on the skin.

settings.question: Can it help with fine lines and wrinkles?
settings.answer: Yes. Peptides and hydrating ingredients help improve the appearance of fine lines, skin texture, and overall firmness over time.

settings.question: Is this moisturizer good for dry skin?
settings.answer: Yes! It’s especially great for dry and dehydrated skin thanks to ingredients like hyaluronic acid, glycerin, and squalane.

settings.question: Can I use it under makeup?
settings.answer: Yes. It absorbs well into the skin and layers smoothly under makeup and sunscreen.

settings.question: How long does it take to see results?
settings.answer: Many people notice softer, more hydrated skin within days, while smoother texture and firmer-looking skin can appear with consistent use over several weeks.

settings.question: What are the key ingredients?
settings.answer: The moisturizer is powered by collagen peptides, hyaluronic acid, ceramides, glycerin, and squalane to help hydrate and support healthier-looking skin.

settings.question: Can I use it with other skincare products?
settings.answer: Yes! It works well alongside most skincare routines, including serums, SPF, and other hydrating or anti-aging products.
